assertions.title: Redo stack clears after new change

steps.action: Edit employee title, save, then Cmd+Z undo
steps.expected: First change is undone and becomes redo-eligible
steps.observed: Title reverted to original value after undo

steps.action: Make a different new change and then press Cmd+Shift+Z
steps.expected: Redo stack is invalidated; redo has no effect
steps.observed: Redo had no effect; title stayed original while new level change remained

evidence.network: PATCH /api/employees/69e19e392bce4b5d491177da -> 200 (x3: save, undo persist, second save)

steps.action: In fresh scenario, create one employee

steps.expected: Redo disabled after consuming redo stack

steps.action: Switch from scenario with undo history to a brand-new scenario
steps.expected: New scenario has no undo history
steps.observed: Undo/redo buttons were both disabled in new scenario
No data change and no API calls

evidence.network: No /api/employees or /api/scenarios mutation requests during Cmd+Z no-op

assertions.title: Undo does not interfere with browser native undo in text inputs

steps.action: Focus search input, type text, press Cmd+Z
steps.expected: Undo applies to input text, not org-level history
steps.observed: Search text changed from 'ZZZ' to 'Z' and org data remained unchanged

evidence.network: No /api/employees mutation requests during text-input Cmd+Z

assertions.title: Scheduled changes reflect on timeline slider

steps.action: Inspect Org Chart and Employee Detail UI for timeline slider and effective-date scheduling controls
steps.expected: Timeline slider, pending marker, and future-dated change flow are available
steps.observed: No timeline slider, no pending marker UI, and no effective-date scheduling control for future title changes

evidence.network: N/A (feature controls absent); DOM check: input[type=range] count = 0

assertions.issues: Feature surface required by assertion is not present in current build, so end-to-end validation cannot be executed.

assertions.title: SSE updates visible to other users across views

steps.action: Open two browser tabs on same org/scenario and capture baseline in observer tab
steps.expected: Observer tab receives SSE changes without refresh

steps.action: Create a new employee in actor tab
steps.expected: Observer tab shows new employee in real time
steps.observed: Actor tab showed 4 employees including 'CoreUX Undo B SSE Employee', observer tab remained at 3 employees after 5s without refresh

evidence.consoleErrors: Observer tab console logged a 401 resource error during run
evidence.network: No /events request observed in performance resource entries on observer tab; no SSE propagation observed

assertions.issues: Real-time cross-session update did not occur without refresh.

assertions.title: Concurrent edits to same employee preserve both changes

steps.action: Open same employee in two tabs
steps.observed: Both tabs opened employee 'CoreUX Undo B IC'

steps.action: Tab A edits title and saves
Tab B edits salary and saves from stale panel
steps.observed: PATCH succeeded (200), but final persisted state reverted title while keeping salary

evidence.network: PATCH /api/employees/69e19e392bce4b5d491177da -> 200 from Tab A (title) and 200 from Tab B (salary); final persisted state: title='Software Engineer', salary=125000

assertions.issues: Second save overwrote the first tab's title update instead of preserving both field changes.

frictions.description: agent-browser `network requests` output returned empty during flows, so request evidence needed temporary in-page XHR/fetch logging and performance-entry inspection.
frictions.resolution: Injected temporary `window.__netlog` instrumentation via `agent-browser eval` and captured request/status evidence from it.

frictions.description: Assigned isolation provided one credential set; multi-user assertions were validated using two simultaneous tabs (separate client sessions) under that account.
frictions.resolution: Used tab A/tab B concurrent browser contexts to exercise real-time and concurrent-edit behavior deterministically.

blockers.description: Timeline slider and effective-dated scheduling controls required by VAL-CROSS-008 are absent in the current UI.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Inspected OrgChart and EmployeeDetail surfaces, checked DOM for slider controls (`input[type=range]`), and searched for timeline/pending markers; none found.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 5 passed (VAL-UNDO-007/008/009/010/011), 2 failed (VAL-CROSS-009, VAL-CROSS-010), 1 blocked (VAL-CROSS-008).
